name: codevis
description: Read agent-generated code as a document: hyperlinked cards, a per-script flowchart, a whole-project data+call web, and change blast radius.

commands.title: codevis: Run A/B eval (index vs raw files)

editor/title.when: resourceLangId == python || resourceLangId == r || resourceLangId == sql

codevis.pythonPath.description: Python interpreter for the indexer. Empty = use the interpreter selected by the Python extension, else `python3`.

codevis.model.markdownDescription:
Language model used by **Describe**, as `vendor/family` — for example `copilot/claude-haiku-4.5` or `copilot/gpt-4o`. A bare family name also works.

Leave empty to use the first model VS Code offers.

The list is whatever you have registered with VS Code — Copilot, or your own key added via **Chat: Manage Language Models**. codevis never sees your key.

Run **codevis: Select language model** to pick from the models actually available on this machine and write the value here — it hides models too small or unusable for this extension.

codevis.describe.callerLines.description: Lines of source around the call site sent to the model when you press Describe. Narrow is cheaper; widen only if the descriptions are weak.

codevis.describe.maxDependencies.description: Max dependency signatures included in the Describe context bundle, to bound token cost.
